GenAiFunction.description: Creates a new Salesforce report via the Analytics API. Requires: report name, report type (from List Report Types), and columns (from Get Report Type Columns). Optional: filter column/operator/value for single filters, Filters JSON for multiple filters, Group By Column for summary reports, and Scope ("user" for my records, "organization" for all records). The report is created in the running user's personal folder. Returns a clickable URL to the report. If the creation fails, check that the column API names came from Get Report Type Columns and that the report type is valid.
